ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "turnover" INTEGER /* Total turnover for the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume for the stock */,
  "action_day" TEXT /* Date of the trading action */,
  "ask_prices" TEXT /* Array of ask prices */,
  "ask_volumes" TEXT /* Array of ask volumes */,
  "bid_prices" TEXT /* Array of bid prices */,
  "bid_volumes" TEXT /* Array of bid volumes */,
  "high_price" INTEGER /* Highest price of the day */,
  "low_price" INTEGER /* Lowest price of the day */,
  "open_price" INTEGER /* Price at the opening of the trading day */,
  "pre_close_price" INTEGER /* Price at the close of the previous trading day */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the stock (e.g., active, halted) */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the trading action */,
  "total_ask_volume" INTEGER /* Total ask volume */,
  "total_bid_volume" INTEGER /* Total bid volume */,
  "weighted_avg_ask_price" INTEGER /* Weighted average ask price */,
  "weighted_avg_bid_price" INTEGER /* Weighted average bid price */,
  "yield_to_maturity" INTEGER /* Yield to maturity for the stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "wind_code" TEXT /* Wind code for the stock */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The stock exchange where the data is sourced from */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* The specific data provider or API used to gather the data */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the reliability and quality of the data */,
  "last_update_time" TEXT /* The last time the data was updated */,
  "is_real_time" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is real-time or delayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol */,
  "wind_code" TEXT /* Wind code for the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "market_capitalization" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the stock information was updated */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* The date the company went public */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* The name of the CEO of the company */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* The location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* The company's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the trade */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Time when the trade was executed */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* The status of the trade (e.g., pending, executed, canceled) */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* The type of order (e.g., market, limit, stop) */,
  "order_price" INTEGER /* The price at which the order was placed */,
  "order_time" TEXT /* The time the order was placed */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* The time the trade was executed */,
  "commission" INTEGER /* The commission charged for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of user account (e.g., individual, institutional) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The user's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* The user's address */,
  "portfolio_value" TEXT /* The current value of the user's portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being analyzed */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Predicted market movement or trend */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "analysis_time" TEXT /* Time when the analysis was performed */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* The method used for the analysis (e.g., machine learning, statistical, expert opinion) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* The source of data used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the analysis process in minutes */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* The confidence interval for the prediction (e.g., 95%) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes from the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
